title: An Explanation of the Grasshopper
content:
The Grasshopper, the grasshopper,
	     I will explain to you: - 
	     He is the Brownies' racehorse,
	     The fairies' Kangaroo.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Vachel Lindsay, titled "An Explanation of the Grasshopper", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
